creator: Arjan.deVet@adv.iae.nl
text:
The mutt port seems not to be able to find sendmail due to
a syntax error in a test(1) command in the configure script.

I fixed this by using some configure code from mutt 0.95
which finds sendmail correctly.

Fix: Updated patch-04 file for the mutt port:
How-To-Repeat: Run make and you will see:

[...]
checking for POSIXized ISC... no
checking for sendmail... test: syntax error
no
checking for gpg... no
[...]
